title: Integration with Layout Templates
text: Integration with Layout Templates The Layout Mode property works in conjunction with the layout template system: Generated and Fragment Modes: These modes integrate with the global ProcScript library USYSHTTP_LAYOUT::GETHTMLLAYOUT . This library receives the Layout Mode value and processes DSP layout content accordingly, ensuring consistent HTML structure and centralized management of shared elements. Full Document Mode: This mode bypasses the layout template system entirely and uses the DSP layout content directly, allowing complete control over the HTML document. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
